summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of CyberVoid file hub with new features. All new functionality including Share Links, Secure Vault, and Avatar Upload are working perfectly. Backend APIs at 88.9% success rate, frontend at 100% success rate. Demo user credentials and vault access tested successfully.

validation_notes.issue: Return 422 status codes instead of expected 400 for validation errors
validation_notes.impact: No functional impact - FastAPI returns 422 for validation errors by design

passed_tests: Demo user login successful (demo@cybervoid.net / DemoPass123!)
Dashboard loads with file stats, share buttons visible on hover
Share link modal with expiration selection (1h, 6h, 24h, 7d, 30d) working
Share link generation, copy functionality, and modal close working
Vault navigation visible in sidebar
Vault unlock with MyVault123 password working (vault already setup)
Vault files page with upload zone and lock button visible
Settings page avatar section with camera icon hover functionality
Settings display name field editable and save button present
Settings accent color presets (8 available) and selection working
Settings security section with password change fields present
Mobile navigation with hamburger menu working perfectly
Upload page with drag zone and public/private toggle working
Search functionality in sidebar working
All navigation items functional (Dashboard, Upload, Vault, Messages, Settings)
Backend APIs: Share Links (POST /api/share, GET /api/share/{id}, DELETE)
Backend APIs: Vault operations (GET /api/vault/status, POST /api/vault/unlock, /upload)
Backend APIs: Avatar upload (POST /api/users/avatar) working
File operations, user profile updates, theme changes all working
Rate limiting, authentication, and search APIs functioning correctly
